title: Defense Innovation Unit
description: We are the only DoW organization focused on accelerating the adoption of commercial technology at speed and scale.
text:
Connect to a powerful network, with speed
We are changing how the Department of War (DoW) approaches commercial technology adoption. Through our agile processes, contract authorities, and diverse team of experts, we have reduced the time it takes the DoW to identify a problem, prototype a commercial solution, and implement it into the field to two years or less.
We and our sister organizations are the front door to DoW. Our regional outreach strategy enables us to lower the barriers to entry by proactively connecting DoW to companies, labs, accelerators, academic partners, and investors in states where the DoW is currently underrepresented as a customer.
Our DoW partners represent every Service and we engage at the highest levels to identify national security challenges that can be solved with commercial technology. Companies on contract with us are backed by top-tier investors and represent $20.1 billion in private investments.
